title: Scavenge
text:
The **category** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (magnifying-glass line; flip for the list).

First dueler to return with a valid **physical object** or **analog image** from that category wins.

No digital screens allowed.
web_description: Category is on the Duel trigger card. First back with a valid object from that category wins. No screens.

title: Alpha Blitz
text:
The **category** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (A–Z line; flip for the list).

Duelers race to name **3 unique, valid items** in that category that start with a **letter chosen by the Judge**.

Avoid: J, K, Q, V, X, Y, Z.

Don't copy the other dueler. If both duelers say the exact same item at the same time, that item doesn't count for either of them.

No repeating words across your answers: **apple pie** is fine, but **apple juice** after is not.
web_description: Category on the Duel trigger card. The Judge picks a letter. Race to name 3 items starting with it. No copying.

title: Theme Blitz
text:
The **category** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (tags line; flip for the list).

Duelers race to name **3 unique, valid items** in that category.

Don't copy the other dueler. If both duelers say the exact same item at the same time, that item doesn't count for either of them.
web_description: Category on the Duel trigger card. Race to name 3 items in it. No copying.

title: Direction Chain
text: Duelers start facing straight ahead. The Judge calls out **LEFT**, **RIGHT**, **UP**, or **DOWN** in **any order** and at **any pace**. Duelers must **turn their head** in that **direction**, returning to **center** afterwards.\n\nContinues until exactly one dueler looks incorrectly.
web_description: The Judge calls directions each beat. Follow and return to center. Ends when one is wrong.

title: Coin Spin
text:
Both duelers spin a coin.

**Longest continuous spin wins**.

Falling off the table counts as stopping. Both duelers cheer on their coins. Vibe: horse race.
web_description: Both spin a coin. Longest spin wins.

title: Table Curling
text:
The Judge picks any **rollable object** (plastic cylinder, pen, marker, chapstick, etc.).

Duelers roll **simultaneously**.

**Farthest** roll without **falling off the table** wins.

If both fall, redo.
web_description: The Judge picks a rollable object. Roll together. Farthest without falling wins.

title: Table Cornhole
text:
The Judge picks any pair of the same **tossable small objects** (bean bag, coin, eraser, chip, etc.).

Duelers stand **2-3 feet from the table**. Both toss the object at the **same time**.

Object closest to the **far edge of the table** without falling off wins.

If both fall, redo.
web_description: The Judge picks 2 matching tossables. Toss together. Closest to far edge without falling wins.

title: Table Bowling
text:
Stand 2 **cylinders** upright at the far end of the table.

Duelers toss **bean bags** to knock their cylinders down from **2-3 feet away**.

Miss - retrieve the bean bag and return to the same spot. If both knock them down in the same round, reset and take a step back. First to knock their cylinder down wins.
web_description: Toss bean bags to knock down a standing cylinder. Step back each tie. First to knock their cylinder down wins.

title: Backhand Flip
text:
Each dueler gets a **small flat object** (bean bag, coin, chip, etc.). Place it flat on the **back of your hand**. 

**Fling** it about **6-12 inches** into the air, **flip that same hand and catch it**.

Repeat **3 times** without dropping. First to finish wins.
web_description: Flip a small object off the back of your hand and catch it. First to complete 3 clean flips wins.

title: Drum Chicken Hat
text:
The Judge calls **DRUM**, **CHICKEN**, or **HAT** in **any order** and at **any pace**.

**DRUM**: two quick table taps.
**CHICKEN**: flap elbows twice (arms tucked).
**HAT**: touch the top of your head.

Wrong move, flinching, or waiting too long loses.
web_description: The Judge calls DRUM/CHICKEN/HAT. Do the matching move. First mistake loses.

title: Monster Mash
text:
The Judge calls a monster in **any order** and at **any pace**.

**VAMPIRE**: cross your arms on your chest.
**FRANKENSTEIN**: hold your arms straight out.
**WEREWOLF**: hands up like claws.

Wrong move, flinching, or waiting too long loses.
web_description: The Judge calls VAMPIRE/FRANKENSTEIN/WEREWOLF. Do the matching pose. First mistake loses.

title: Card Flip
text:
Each dueler takes **one card from the word deck** (any list card), places it **face down, partly off the table edge**.

On 'Go,' flick it upward so it **flips face up onto the table**.

Repeat **3 times** to win.
web_description: Use word-deck cards. Flick from the table edge. First to land face-up 3 times wins.

title: Dead Center
text:
The Judge places a **coin in the center** of the table and hands each Dueler a **small tossable object** (bean bag, coin, eraser, chip, etc.).

Duelers stand **a few feet from the table**. Both toss at the **same time**.

Closest to the coin wins.

If tied, redo.
web_description: Toss a small object closest to the coin. Simultaneous throws. Closest wins. Ties redo.

title: Coin Flip
text:
Place a coin on the **back of your hand**.

Using only your **thumb**, flick it into the air and catch it in the **same hand**.

 First to **3 catches** wins.
web_description: Flick a coin off the back of your hand with your thumb and catch it. First to 3 wins.

title: Alternating Theme Blitz
text:
The **category** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (tags line; flip for the list).

Duelers take turns naming items in that category - **one at a time, back and forth**.

You have **5 seconds** per turn. No repeats. Blank and you lose.
web_description: Category on the Duel trigger card. Take turns naming items. 5 seconds per turn. Blank and you lose.

title: Alternating Alpha Blitz
text:
The **category** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (A–Z line; flip for the list). The **Judge** picks a letter.

Avoid: J, K, Q, V, X, Y, Z.

Duelers take turns naming items in that category starting with that letter - **one at a time, back and forth**.

You have **5 seconds** per turn. No repeats. Blank and you lose.

No repeating words across your answers: **apple pie** is fine, but **apple juice** after is not.
web_description: Category on the Duel trigger card. The Judge picks a letter. Take turns naming items. 5 seconds per turn. Blank and you lose.

title: Alpha² Blitz
text:
The **category** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (A–Z line; flip for the list).

Duelers take turns naming items **in that category** - **one at a time, back and forth** - in alphabetical order. First answer starts with **A**, next with **B**, and so on.

You have **5 seconds** per turn. No skipping letters - if yours is tough, that's the game. Blank and you lose.
web_description: Category on the Duel trigger card. Take turns naming items in that category A, B, C…. 5 seconds per turn. Blank and you lose.

title: Star Blitz
text:
The **first name** is on the **Duel Trigger** card (star line; flip for the list).

Both duelers race to name **3 famous people** who share that first name.

First to name 3 wins. Disputed names = **judge decides**.
web_description: First name on the Duel trigger card. Race to name 3 famous people with that name. Judge settles disputes.

title: Coin Spin
text:
Each player spins a coin simultaneously.

Last coin still spinning wins. Falling off the table counts as stopping.

All players must cheer their coin on.

title: Direction Chain
text:
Going clockwise starting with the player who drew this card, each player calls a direction - **LEFT**, **RIGHT**, **UP**, or **DOWN** - and everyone turns their head in that direction simultaneously, then returns to **center**.

Wrong direction, flinching, or hesitating - you're out. Last player standing wins.

title: Dead Center
text:
Place a **coin in the center** of the table. Each player gets a **small tossable object** (bean bag, coin, eraser, chip, etc.).

All players stand **a few feet from the table** and toss at the **same time**.

Closest to the coin wins. If tied, redo.

title: Coin Flip
text:
Each player balances a coin on their **thumb**.

Flick it into the air and catch it in the **same hand**.

 First to **3 catches** wins.

title: Chain Alpha Blitz
text:
**Category** is on the **Duel trigger** card (A–Z line). The drawer picks a **letter**.

Starting with the player who drew this card and going **clockwise**, each player names one item from the **category** starting with the **letter**.

Hesitate, repeat, or blank - you're out. Last player standing wins.

title: Alpha² Blitz
text:
**Category** is on the **Duel trigger** card (A–Z line).

**Clockwise** from the player who drew this card, players take turns naming items from the **category** in alphabetical order - first **A**, then **B**, and so on.

You have **5 seconds** per turn. Too long and you're out. Last player standing wins.

title: Mass Confusion Scavenge
text:
**Category** is on the **Duel trigger** card (glass line).

All players race simultaneously to return with a valid **physical object** or **analog image** from the **category**.

No digital screens. First back wins.

title: Monster Mash
text:
**Clockwise** from the player who drew this card, each player calls a move and everyone performs it simultaneously.

**VAMPIRE**: cross arms on chest.
**FRANKENSTEIN**: arms out.
**WEREWOLF**: hands like claws.

Wrong move, flinching, or hesitating - you're out. Last player standing wins.

title: Drum Chicken Hat
text:
**Clockwise** from the player who drew this card, each player calls a move and everyone performs it simultaneously.

**DRUM**: two quick table taps.
**CHICKEN**: flap elbows twice.
**HAT**: touch the top of your head.

Wrong move, flinching, or hesitating - you're out. Last player standing wins.

title: Table Cornhole
text:
Each player gets a **small tossable object** (bean bag, coin, eraser, chip, etc.).

All players stand **2-3 feet from the table** and toss at the **same time**.

Closest to the **far edge** without falling off wins. If all fall, redo.

title: Table Curling
text:
Each player gets a **rollable object** (plastic cylinder, pen, marker, chapstick, etc.).

All players roll **simultaneously**.

**Farthest** roll without **falling off the table** wins. If all fall, redo.

title: Backhand Flip
text:
Each player places a **small flat object** (bean bag, coin, chip, etc.) on the **back of their hand**.

Fling it **6-12 inches** into the air, flip that same hand, and catch it.

 First to **3** wins.

title: Sobriety Test
text:
Touch your **nose** with your **left** index finger while pointing your **right** index finger straight out. Then switch - **right** to nose, **left** pointing out.

And so on...

title: Chain Star Blitz
text:
Going **clockwise** from the player who drew, each player names a different famous person with the **first name** from the Duel trigger (star line).

Hesitate, repeat, or blank - you're out. Last player standing wins.

Disputed names = **group vote**.
